title: NoLimit Vanilla+
description: The ultimate, lightweight Vanilla+ experience! 130+ hand-picked mods for maximum performance, amazing QoL features, enhanced exploration, and beautiful shaders out-of-the-box.
body:
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/nolimit-vanilla+?logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C&label=downloads)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nolimit-vanilla+) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/nolimit-vanilla+?logo=minecraft)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nolimit-vanilla+) [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-blue?logo=fabric)](https://fabricmc.net/) **NoLimit Vanilla+** is the ultimate, lightweight Vanilla+ experience for Minecraft 1.21.11! It carefully enhances the base game with over 130+ hand-picked mods to provide massive performance boosts, stunning visuals, and highly requested Quality-of-Life features—without losing the classic Minecraft feel. Just download, click play, and enjoy! ### ✨ Key Features * 🚀 **Maximum Performance:** Fully optimized from the ground up to ensure high FPS and smooth gameplay, even on weaker systems. Out-of-the-box Shader Support included! * 🗺️ **Enhanced Exploration:** Discover brand-new, seamlessly integrated structures and dungeons (powered by [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)). * 📍 **Advanced Navigation:** Never get lost again with [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and its additional features. * 🛠️ **Quality of Life:** Enjoy essential modern features like [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) (OptiFine-like zoom) and [FreeCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam). * ⚙️ **Multiplayer Ready:** Designed to work flawlessly on servers! Most mods are client-side only, meaning you can use this pack on almost any vanilla server. ### ❓ FAQ **Q: Something broke or I have a mod suggestion!** A: We'd love to hear from you! Please [Post it on our Google Forms!](https://forms.gle/ZRx7jCwqCuPxDahb7) **Q: Will this Modpack get updated for newer versions?** A: Absolutely. We are constantly working on maintaining and updating the Modpack for the latest Minecraft releases. **Q: What exactly is in the Modpack?** A: You can view the full, latest mod list by clicking on your desired release in the [Versions Tab](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nolimit-vanilla+/versions) and scrolling down. --- ### 📝 Versioning Scheme The version format is `-x.y(.z)`: * **MC-Version:** The target Minecraft version. * **x:** Mod list revision (Significant mod additions/removals). * **y:** Configuration revision (Changes to settings/configs). * **z:** Minor updates (Usually just mod updates without new additions). * *(Note: x.y.z resets to 1.0.0 on new major Minecraft versions).* ---

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
